title: Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine
why_this_song: Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine by James Brown (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Get it together, right on, right on"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Like a, like a sex machine, man (yeah go ahead!)"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Stay on the scene, (get on up)"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Stay on the scene, (get on up)"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Fellas, I'm ready to get up and do my thing (yeah go ahead)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Right on, right on, (right on, right on)

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Get Up (I Feel Like Being a) Sex Machine" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
